name: Runtime Selector
description: Select the best runtime or model path for a task by balancing capability, latency, cost, reliability, context fit, policy constraints, and fallback behavior.
not_for: choosing by benchmark prestige or personal preference alone
ignoring runtime health, quotas, or policy constraints
routing sensitive work to non-compliant paths
postmortem-style auditing of live runtime failures
typical_inputs: task type, complexity, and quality target
context length, tool use, or multimodal needs
runtime health, quota state, and fallback options
